name: TeeTime Indoor Golf - Glenview
about: TeeTime Indoor Golf - Glenview is a fully automated, 24/7 indoor golf simulator facility. It offers private, self-serve bays equipped with premium technology for golfers of all skill levels. The venue provides an accessible and affordable experience with no front desk or staff on site, allowing for flexible, on-demand bookings managed through a dedicated app.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with fully automated bay lighting and systems
Premium technology including TrackMan iO simulators
Flexible booking allowing changes up to 15 minutes before

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy not specified, no in-house bar mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Pro-level ball tracking with detailed shot data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs as the venue does not provide rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: While self-service refreshments are available on-site, the venue does not mention an official policy regarding bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify an average time for an 18-hole session, as it depends on the player's pace and simulator software being used.

faq.question: Is TeeTime Indoor Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is designed for all skill levels and does not have age restrictions, making it potentially suitable for juniors, though specific kids' programs are not mentioned.
